de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation

Class DefaultTacletTranslator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.AbstractSkeletonGenerator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.DefaultTacletTranslator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SkeletonGenerator

    public class DefaultTacletTranslator
extends AbstractSkeletonGenerator
    Translates a rewrite taclet to a formula.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      private int getPolarity(RewriteTaclet rwTaclet) 
      Term translate(Taclet taclet, TermServices services)
      Translates a RewriteTaclet to a formula.
      private Term translateEquivalence(Term find, Term replace, int polarity, TermServices services) 
      private Term translateReplaceAndAddFormula(TacletGoalTemplate template, Term find, int polarity, TermServices services)
      Translates the replace and add pattern of a goal template to: (find<->replace)->add
      Use this method if you want to translate a taclet, where the find pattern is a formula.
      private Term translateReplaceAndAddSequent(TacletGoalTemplate template, int type, TermServices services) 
      private Term translateReplaceAndAddTerm(TacletGoalTemplate template, Term find, TermServices services)
      Translates the replace and add pattern of a goal template to: find=replace->add
      Use this method if you want to translate a taclet, where the find pattern is a term.

    • Method Detail

      • translateReplaceAndAddTerm

        private Term translateReplaceAndAddTerm(TacletGoalTemplate template,
                              Term find,
                              TermServices services)
        Translates the replace and add pattern of a goal template to: find=replace->add
        Use this method if you want to translate a taclet, where the find pattern is a term.
        Parameters:
        template - contains the replace and add pattern that are to be translated.
        find - the find pattern of the taclet, already translated.
        services - TODO
        Returns:
        translation

      • translateReplaceAndAddFormula

        private Term translateReplaceAndAddFormula(TacletGoalTemplate template,
                                 Term find,
                                 int polarity,
                                 TermServices services)
        Translates the replace and add pattern of a goal template to: (find<->replace)->add
        Use this method if you want to translate a taclet, where the find pattern is a formula.
        Parameters:
        template - contains the replace and add pattern that are to be translated.
        find - the find pattern of the taclet, already translated.
        polarity - a value between -1 and 1. describes the expected polarity of the find clause (-1 antecedent, 0 both, +1 succedent)
        services - TODO
        Returns:
        translation

      • translateEquivalence

        private Term translateEquivalence(Term find,
                        Term replace,
                        int polarity,
                        TermServices services)

      • translateReplaceAndAddSequent

        private Term translateReplaceAndAddSequent(TacletGoalTemplate template,
                                 int type,
                                 TermServices services)

      • translate

        public Term translate(Taclet taclet,
             TermServices services)
               throws IllegalTacletException
        Translates a RewriteTaclet to a formula.
        Parameters:
        taclet - taclet to be translated.
        services - TODO
        Returns:
        returns the translation of the taclet.
        Throws:
        IllegalTacletException

      • getPolarity
